failedAssertions.reason: UIFileSharingEnabled and LSSupportsOpeningDocumentsInPlace missing from iOS Info.plist in project.yml. Without these keys, saved .netmonsurvey files are sandboxed and invisible in the Files app.

WiFiInfoService.fetchCurrentWiFi() calls NEHotspotNetwork.fetchCurrent() directly with no caching. Apple rate-limits NEHotspotNetwork calls and may return nil if polled too frequently. A caching layer with >=1s TTL is required.

No unit test for 2000+ point rendering performance. Current IDW algorithm is O(gridWidth * gridHeight * numPoints); extrapolating from 200-point benchmark (~2s), 2000 points would take ~20s on a 200x200 grid, far exceeding the <5s target. Requires spatial indexing or GPU offload.
